title: Fix Staging Login Failure
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to be able to log into the staging environment without errors, so that I can test and validate features before they go to production.
description:
Fix a login failure on the staging environment that prevented the product owner from authenticating. The issue was related to the region check / sandbox instance resolution logic introduced in MBT-468.

The fix was implemented as part of the MBT-468 resolution, which addressed the broader sandbox instance lookup problem.
acceptance_criteria: Users can successfully log into the staging environment
Login does not throw errors related to region validation
ux_changes: Resolves login failure that showed an error screen on the staging environment.
middleware_changes: Fix applied in MBT-468 to handle sandbox instance resolution during region check middleware.
implementation_notes: This was a symptom of the sandbox region check issue fixed in MBT-468.
comment_summary: Developer noted the fix was applied in MBT-468.
